source.method: read-only extraction from the bundled JavaScript in the standalone executable
source.note: Byte offsets identify the inspected executable version and are not stable across Amp releases.

precedence: Connecting until transport is connected and the thread is ready
Sending while the first thread send is pending
Waiting after the first send is acknowledged but before the loop leaves idle
Waiting for Approval while the loop awaits approval
Waiting while a tool executor is not yet running
Running Tools during tool use with a running executor
Streaming for other visible model streams
overrides: Reconnecting or Reconnecting in <n>s while transport reconnects
Cancelling while cancellation is in progress
Catching Up while replaying an existing thread from idle
Disconnected for the disconnected client state
statusStateMachine.idle: null: the bottom-left border has no status text
statusStateMachine.completion: no distinct Completing label; the current phase remains until idle, then clears

tokenCounter.meaning: an activity estimate, not provider-reported model usage and not a rate
tokenCounter.derivation: floor(cumulative UTF-8 bytes in the current visible stage / 4)
stages: Thinking counts visible reasoning text bytes
Streaming counts visible assistant text bytes and streamed tool-use JSON bytes
tokenCounter.reset: zero on a Thinking/Streaming stage change and when the active block kind changes within the same client streaming state
tokenCounter.visibility: shown only when the current client status matches the byte accumulator stage and the byte count is greater than zero

toolSpinner.sequence: stateful and partly random, not a fixed cli-spinners loop
toolSpinner.generator: an eight-cell graph automaton starts from [on,off,on,off,on,off,on,off], maps the eight cells to braille dots, advances on each tick, and reseeds with Math.random when it is stable, repeats after two generations, reaches 15 generations, empties, or has fewer than two live cells

statusRendering.normalPrefix: animated blue wave glyph followed by one space
statusRendering.reconnectingPrefix: hollow circle, not the wave spinner
statusRendering.counterUpdates: event-driven when accumulated stream bytes change
